content.speakerText: Hey, long time no see! You been posting pics on IG lately?
content.speakerTextCn: 嘿，好久不见！你最近在Instagram发照片了吗？

options.text: I've been posting a lot! You should check out my new travel pics.
I'm busy with work, so I'm not using any social media.
Yes, I post every day on LinkedIn.
No, I deleted all my accounts last month.

content.explanation: 正确答案回应了对方关于Instagram发照片的提问，使用了自然口语表达。选项2虽然真实，但未直接回应‘IG’这个具体平台，偏离焦点；选项3提到LinkedIn，与提问平台不符；选项4虽合理，但语气过于绝对，不符合轻松闲聊语境。

content.speakerText: What’s new with you? Any cool posts on TikTok lately?
content.speakerTextCn: 你最近怎么样？TikTok上有发什么酷炫的视频吗？

options.text: Nah, I’m just scrolling. Nothing worth posting.
Yeah, I’ve been posting on my blog every day.

content.explanation: 正确答案用口语化表达‘Nah’和‘nothing worth posting’自然回应了关于TikTok的闲聊。选项2虽真实但未回应社交平台问题；选项3提到‘blog’，与TikTok平台不符；选项4过于极端，不符合日常对话逻辑。

content.speakerText: You look like you’ve been on vacation! Did you post anything?
content.speakerTextCn: 你看起来像是刚度假回来！你发照片了吗？

options.text: Yeah, I posted a few pics — you should’ve seen my beach sunset shot!
I didn’t go anywhere, just stayed home.
I posted it on my company’s website.
I don’t know what you’re talking about.

content.explanation: 正确答案积极回应了对方的观察，并自然地引导对方去看照片，符合社交闲聊的互动模式。选项2虽真实但回避了社交行为；选项3提到公司网站，与个人社交媒体语境不符；选项4语气生硬，不符合朋友间轻松对话。

content.template: I've been posting a lot! You should check out my new travel ___.
content.hint: 在Instagram上常用来指‘照片’的口语词

content.template: I'm kinda taking a ___ from social media.
content.hint: 表达‘暂时停止使用社交媒体’的常用搭配
content.knowledgePoint: 固定表达（take a break from）

content.template: IG's been kind of ___ lately — I'm on TikTok now.
content.hint: 表达对某个平台失去兴趣时的常用形容词
content.knowledgePoint: 情感表达形容词（boring = 无聊）

content.speakerText: Hey, long time no see! You been posting pics on IG lately?
content.speakerTextCn: 嘿，好久不见！你最近在Instagram发照片了吗？
expectedAnswers: Yeah, I’ve been posting a ton! Check out my beach trip photos.
Not really, I needed a break from scrolling all day.
I switched to TikTok — IG just doesn’t feel fresh anymore.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否直接回应了关于Instagram发照片的问题
语言准确性：语法和词汇使用是否正确，是否使用缩写和口语词
表达自然度：是否符合朋友间轻松、真实的对话风格
关键词覆盖：是否使用了pics, IG, posting, break, switch 等场景关键词

content.speakerText: What’s up? Any new posts on your feed?
content.speakerTextCn: 最近怎么样？你的动态有发新东西吗？
expectedAnswers: Not much, just posting cute cat videos now.
I’ve been offline for a week — needed to unplug.
I started posting on Pinterest — it’s way more chill than Instagram.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否回应了关于社交媒体动态的询问
语言准确性：是否正确使用现在完成时、口语缩写和自然表达
表达自然度：语气是否轻松、有个性，避免机械或生硬
关键词覆盖：是否使用了post, feed, offline, unplug, Instagram 等关键词

content.speakerText: You look like you just got back from somewhere cool — did you post it?
content.speakerTextCn: 你看起来刚从某个酷地方回来——你发了照片吗？
expectedAnswers: Yep! I posted a whole story — you missed it, I guess?
I did, but I’m not big on sharing vacations anymore.
I posted it on TikTok — Instagram’s too cluttered for me now.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否回应了对方关于‘是否发照片’的观察和提问
语言准确性：是否使用了恰当的时态和口语化表达（如‘I guess’, ‘too cluttered’）
表达自然度：是否表现出真实情感（如遗憾、冷漠、偏好转变）
关键词覆盖：���否使用了post, story, Instagram, TikTok, sharing 等场景词
